AccountDetail.f44f287.description: Full account view returned from POST/GET-by-id.
AccountDetail.f44f287.title: AccountDetail

AdapterConfigResponse.f44f287.description: Adapter config view returned with secrets redacted.
AdapterConfigResponse.f44f287.title: AdapterConfigResponse

ApiError.f44f287.description: Standard problem-detail shape used by every Tenant Management endpoint.
ApiError.f44f287.title: ApiError

CreateAccountRequest.f44f287.description:
Pre-map a GAM advertiser to a billing key.

Upserts by the same natural key ``_sync_accounts_impl`` uses so the
next ``sync_accounts`` call from a buyer agent finds the row already
wired and skips ``pending_provision`` entirely.

Validation:
- ``billing=agent`` requires ``buyer_agent_principal_id``.
- ``sandbox=True`` rejects ``gam_advertiser_id`` — sandbox routes to
  the per-tenant sandbox advertiser, not a caller-specified one.
CreateAccountRequest.f44f287.title: CreateAccountRequest

CreateAccountRequest.f44f287.BrandRef.description:
Compact brand reference. Mirrors AdCP ``BrandReference`` minimally —
``domain`` is the natural-key field; ``brand_id`` is an optional
publisher-side stable id when one brand owns multiple domains.
CreateAccountRequest.f44f287.BrandRef.title: BrandRef

ListAccountsManagedResponse.f44f287.Acco.description: Compact account view used by list endpoints.
ListAccountsManagedResponse.f44f287.Acco.title: AccountSummary

PreviewAdapterRequest.f44f287.description: Pre-provision adapter probe — same union as :class:`ProvisionTenantRequest`.
PreviewAdapterRequest.f44f287.title: PreviewAdapterRequest

PreviewAdapterResponse.f44f287.description:
Adapter preview with network metadata for the Storefront UX.

``ok=False`` (bad creds) is returned with HTTP 200 — Storefront renders
this inline. Hard errors (malformed body, missing API key) still surface
via the normal 4xx path.
PreviewAdapterResponse.f44f287.title: PreviewAdapterResponse

ProvisionTenantRequest.f44f287.InitialPr.description: Optional initial advertiser created at provision time.
ProvisionTenantRequest.f44f287.InitialPr.title: InitialPrincipalRequest

ProvisionTenantResponse.f44f287.AdapterS.description: Compact adapter status block returned in provision responses.
ProvisionTenantResponse.f44f287.AdapterS.title: AdapterStatusResponse

ProvisionTenantResponse.f44f287.Provisio.description:
Initial principal returned from provision.

Note: managed-mode buyer-protocol auth flows through the identity-propagation
contract, not per-principal tokens (see sprint 2 § Auth boundary). No
``api_token`` field is emitted here.
ProvisionTenantResponse.f44f287.Provisio.title: ProvisionedPrincipalResponse

TenantDetail.f44f287.description: Full tenant detail returned from ``GET /tenants/{id}`` and lifecycle responses.
TenantDetail.f44f287.title: TenantDetail

TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusAdapt.description: Adapter block of the tenant status snapshot.
TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusAdapt.title: StatusAdapterBlock

TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusMedia.description: Top-level media-buy counters (a buy contains 1+ packages).
TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusMedia.title: StatusMediaBuysBlock

TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusPacka.description:
Package-level counters (line items inside media buys).

``last_24h_impressions`` is set to 0 until delivery aggregation is wired
up — see :mod:`docs/design/managed-tenant-mode-sprint-1.5.md` Open Q #3.
TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusPacka.title: StatusPackagesBlock

TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusSyncs.description: Recent state of each sync category for a tenant.
TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusSyncs.title: StatusSyncsBlock

TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusWebho.description: Outbound-webhook summary. ``None`` until sprint 6 lands the table.
TenantStatusResponse.f44f287.StatusWebho.title: StatusWebhooksBlock

TestConnectionResponse.f44f287.description: Result of an adapter connection probe.
TestConnectionResponse.f44f287.title: TestConnectionResponse

UpdateTenantRequest.f44f287.description:
PATCH body — only platform-managed fields are exposed.

``external_org_id`` and ``external_source`` are NOT modifiable post-creation;
they identify the tenant's relationship with the upstream platform.
``is_active`` is changed via the deactivate/reactivate endpoints, not PATCH.
UpdateTenantRequest.f44f287.title: UpdateTenantRequest

ValidationError.6a07bef.description: Model of a validation error response.
ValidationError.6a07bef.title: ValidationError

ValidationError.6a07bef.ValidationErrorE.description: Model of a validation error response element.
ValidationError.6a07bef.ValidationErrorE.title: ValidationErrorElement

get.summary: Health check endpoint for the tenant management API.

post.description: Lets the Storefront UI confirm an adapter grant + auto-fill currency and timezone before committing to a tenant. Bad creds return 200 with ``ok=false`` (renders inline) — only malformed bodies / missing API key surface as 4xx via the normal middleware path.
post.summary: Probe an adapter and return network metadata — no persistence.
Provision a managed tenant (one-shot create + adapter + currency + property tag + optional principal).

delete.description: Returns 409 ``tenant_has_active_resources`` if the tenant has any active media buys.
delete.summary: Soft-delete a tenant by default. Hard-delete requires ``?hard=true`` and ``X-Confirm-Delete: yes``.

get.summary: Return :class:`TenantDetail` for a tenant. 404 if the tenant doesn't exist.

patch.summary: Update platform-managed fields on a tenant (PATCH semantics — only listed fields are touched).

get.summary: List Accounts for a tenant. Filters: ``operator``, ``billing``, ``status``, ``sandbox``, ``advertiser_mapped``.

post.description: Upserts by the same natural key ``_sync_accounts_impl`` uses so a later ``sync_accounts`` call from a buyer agent finds the row already wired and skips the ``pending_provision`` round trip. Returns 201 on create, 200 on update.
post.summary: Pre-map a GAM advertiser to a billing key.

get.summary: Return the tenant's adapter config with secrets redacted.

put.summary: Replace the tenant's adapter config. Tests the connection before commit.

post.summary: Probe the saved adapter config without modifying state.
Idempotently deactivate a tenant. Calling on an already-inactive tenant is a no-op.

get.description: One round-trip, one cache lifetime — covers adapter health, sync runs, open workflows, media-buy/package counters, and creative state. The response is computed (not stored) and cached in-memory for ~5s.
get.summary: Consolidated operational snapshot for a tenant.
